about.title: About Me
about.heading: Passionate Developer with 5+ Years of Experience
about.content: I specialize in building scalable, high-performance applications using modern web technologies. With a strong foundation in both frontend and backend development, I create comprehensive solutions that solve real-world problems. My expertise spans from building responsive user interfaces to architecting robust backend systems.
